items.title: The U.S.-led war in Iran will dominate Trump's G7 trip to France
items.summary: The gathering was originally expected to be a meeting focused on a variety of separate economic and security issues.
items.titleZh: 美国领导的伊朗战争将主导特朗普的七国集团法国之行
items.summaryZh: 这次会议最初预计将是一次集中讨论各种单独的经济和安全问题的会议。

items.title: IQM adds a Vanguard board director to its bench as Europe’s first quantum Nasdaq listing approaches
items.summary: IQM Quantum Computers, the Finnish maker of superconducting quantum systems, has appointed Barbara Venneman to its board of directors as the company approaches what would be the first Nasdaq listing by a European quantum computing company. Venneman currently …
items.titleZh: 随着欧洲首个量子纳斯达克上市临近，IQM在其董事会中增加了一名先锋董事
items.summaryZh: 芬兰超导量子系统制造商IQM Quantum Computers已任命Barbara Venneman为董事会成员，因为该公司即将成为欧洲量子计算公司首次在纳斯达克上市。Venneman目前…

items.title: SpaceX surge further boosts Saudi billionaire prince’s fortune
items.summary: Prince Alwaleed bin Talal’s investment firm Kingdom Holding Co. surged after SpaceX’s share gains on its first day of trading drove the value of the firm’s holding to almost $7 billion.
items.titleZh: SpaceX的激增进一步增加了沙特亿万富翁王子的财富
items.summaryZh: Alwaleed bin Talal王子的投资公司Kingdom Holding Co.在SpaceX上市首日股价上涨后飙升，该公司持有的股份价值接近70亿美元。

items.title: Wall Street is gaining access to new catastrophe models to help predict wars
items.summary: The same people modeling natural disasters are now adapting their methodology to help investors, banks and insurers predict military conflicts.
items.titleZh: 华尔街正在获得新的灾难模型来帮助预测战争
items.summaryZh: 这些模拟自然灾害的人现在正在调整他们的方法，以帮助投资者、银行和保险公司预测军事冲突。

items.title: Crypto exchanges promised users access to the SpaceX IPO. The tokenized shares never arrived.
items.summary: Crypto users who thought they had found a way into the hottest IPO in years through tokenized SpaceX stock discovered on Friday that the shares would not be arriving. Binance Wallet, Bybit, and Bitget Wallet all canceled their tokenized SpaceX offerings after…
items.titleZh: 加密货币交易所承诺用户可以参与SpaceX的首次公开募股。代币化股票从未到来。
items.summaryZh: 周五，那些认为自己已经通过代币化的SpaceX股票找到了进入多年来最热门IPO的方法的加密用户发现，这些股票不会到来。币安钱包、Bybit和Bitget钱包在…

items.title: The lawyer who won a $6 million verdict against Meta says AI let him do 30 hours of work in 10
items.summary: Mark Lanier, the Texas trial lawyer who won a landmark $6 million verdict against Meta and Google in a social media addiction case in March, says AI was central to his preparation and execution throughout the five-week trial. Lanier told Business Insider that…
items.titleZh: 赢得对Meta 600万美元判决的律师表示，人工智能让他在10天内完成30个小时的工作
items.summaryZh: 得克萨斯州出庭律师Mark Lanier在3月份的一起社交媒体成瘾案件中赢得了对Meta和谷歌的600万美元的里程碑式判决，他说，在整个为期五周的审判中，人工智能是他准备和执行的核心。拉尼尔告诉《商业内幕》…
